metadata.name: Lifelink — damage dealt also causes controller to gain life
metadata.description: p1 has a creature with lifelink (Darksteel Colossus 11/11) attacking p2's 3/3 blocker. When Darksteel Colossus deals combat damage, p1 gains 11 life (lifelink). The blocker is destroyed. Tests lifelink CR 702.15: damage dealt by creature with lifelink causes its controller to gain that much life.
metadata.generation_notes: Lifelink is a static ability (CR 702.15a). When a creature with lifelink deals damage, its controller gains that much life simultaneously. Darksteel Colossus has lifelink (check definitions). Script is informational — no direct combat commands in harness, uses informational action types.

script.step_note: p1 attacks with Darksteel Colossus. p2 blocks with Solemn Simulacrum.

actions.description: Initial: p1 at 30 life, Darksteel Colossus untapped
Declare attackers: Darksteel Colossus attacks p2
actions.note: CR 508.1: Darksteel Colossus declared as attacker against p2.

actions.description: Declare blockers: Solemn Simulacrum blocks Darksteel Colossus
actions.note: CR 509.1: p2 declares Solemn Simulacrum as a blocker.

actions.description: Combat damage: Darksteel Colossus deals 11 (lifelink), Solemn Simulacrum deals 2
actions.note: CR 510.1: Combat damage assigned simultaneously. Darksteel Colossus deals 11 to Solemn Simulacrum. Solemn Simulacrum deals 2 to Darksteel Colossus (indestructible, no effect). CR 702.15: Lifelink — p1 gains 11 life.

actions.description: SBA: Solemn Simulacrum has lethal damage
actions.note: Solemn Simulacrum: 2/2 took 11 damage — lethal. Goes to graveyard.
